2026 Event Recap

GHOST Energy · On-Course Activation

BikiniBash ’26

VenueBali Hai Golf Club · LV
DatesJune 6, 2026
FormatOn-Course Takeover
GHOST Lifestyle · Experiential Marketing Feel Good Energy

01 — The Moment

Bikini Bash ’26

We Took
Over The
Hole.

GHOST showed up to the marquee day on the golf calendar with a full-scale on-course takeover — branded tee boxes, an on-course sampling bar, and a content set built for the feed.

One day, ~250 golfers and guests, and a non-stop pour of GHOST ENERGY across all 18 holes. This is how it went.

02 — Why We Showed Up

OBJECTIVES
01

Own The Round

Plant GHOST at the center of golf-day culture and out-energize every other brand on the course.

02

Pour & Convert

Put cold cans in hands at scale — turn first sips into trial, follows, and repeat purchase.

03

Feed The Feed

Build a content engine of creator + UGC moments that lives long after the last set.

Strategic ObjectivesFeel Good Energy

Clubhouse
